name: CAS : Tighnari
description:
this is my second bot now, and the first bot in the CAS (Create A Story) series! i’ll make more genshin bots, and start steering into the women as well! 🤭 tighnari is one of the best sumeru boys, and I tried to make it as accurate as possible with the help of Wiki. If you have some more characters I should do, or maybe a different variant of this character, let me know!

check out my other CAS bots!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

♯ Zhongli 🧡💛

♯ Neuvillette 💙
